title: No Despawning Death Loot
description: This pack will prevent your death loot from despawning.
body:
# Description
This pack will prevent your death loot from despawning. Note: If gamerule `doImmediateRespawn` [is set to true](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Game_rule#List_of_game_rules), all items dropped exactly when the player died will also be set to not despawn in order to allow this datapack to still work.

# Admin Controls
Lag from Death Loot would be very rare, but in case it does happen, here are some Admin commands:
- `function no_death_loot_despawn:admin_kill_death_loot {amount: #}`: kills # nearest loot

A couple other commands for Admins:
- `function no_death_loot_despawn:admin_count_death_items`: counts the amount of all rendered Death Item entities
- `function no_death_loot_despawn:admin_find_rendered_death_loot`: chats the location of all rendered Death Item entities.

# Optional Advancment Guides
To enable a list with guides for my datapacks, use `/advancement grant <targets> from dragon3025:root`.
